title: arctotis × vomerensis
intro: Arctotis × vomerensis, also known as the Vlambos Daisy, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its vibrant yellow and orange daisy-like flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arctotis × vomerensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
